revision.text:
{{神社 |名称 = 左内神社 |画像 = [[File:Sanai-jinja (Mishima, Shizuoka).JPG|250px]]
鳥居と拝殿
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|5|39.7|N|138|55|55.8|E}}}} |所在地 = [[静岡県]][[三島市]]中島310-2 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|5|39.7|N|138|55|55.8|E|display=inline,title}} |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=左内神社|coordinates= {{coord2|35|5|39.7|N|138|55|55.8|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} |祭神 = 阿米都瀬氣多知命 |社格 = [[式内社]]、旧[[村社]] |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 7月17日 |神事 = }} '''左内神社'''（さないじんじゃ）は、[[静岡県]][[三島市]]中島に鎮座する[[神社]][http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402003 左内神社] - 静岡県神社庁。 == 概要 == 三島市の中島地区の南西、[[御殿川]]と中島公民館の狭間に鎮座している。 [[式内社]]である'''文梨神社'''（ふみなしじんじゃ）/'''父無神社'''（ちちなしじんじゃ）、あるいは'''阿米都瀬気多知命神社'''（あめつせけたちのみことじんじゃ）に比定されている[https://www.city.mishima.shizuoka.jp/ipn030092.html 左内神社] - 三島市[https://www.city.mishima.shizuoka.jp/mishima_info/amenity/rekishi/jinja/jinnja.htm 神社] - 三島市。 創建は不詳だが、かつてはその名の通り、[[三嶋大社]]の参道でもある旧下田街道の東側（三嶋大社から見て左側）に鎮座していたとされる。 具体的には、元来は現在地より北方、中地区の手無(てなし)地蔵の付近に鎮座していたとされ、一説には手無(てなし)も、父無(ちちなし)(→文梨(ふみなし))も、'''父梨/父無(ててなし)'''が訛ったものとされる。 そこから南方の現・中島浄水場付近に遷座したが（石碑あり）、[[明治]]19年（[[1886年]]）2月に火災に遭い、建物を全部焼失し、宝物、古文書を全部失ってしまう。その後、明治20年（[[1887年]]）4月に現地に移転新築し、[[昭和]]16年（[[1941年]]）に改築され今日に至っている。 == 祭神 == * 阿米都瀬気多知命（あめつせけたちのみこと） == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} == 関連項目 == * [[三嶋大社]] == 外部リンク == * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402003 左内神社] - 静岡県神社庁 * [https://www.city.mishima.shizuoka.jp/ipn030092.html 左内神社] - 三島市 ** [https://www.city.mishima.shizuoka.jp/mishima_info/amenity/rekishi/jinja/jinnja.htm 神社] - 三島市 {{デフォルトソート:さないしんしや}} [[Category:静岡県の旧村社]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]] [[Category:三島市の建築物]] [[Category:三島市の歴史]]

{{神社 |名称 = 左内神社 |画像 = [[File:Sanai-jinja (Mishima, Shizuoka).JPG|250px]]

| name = Sanai Shrine

{{nihongo|'''Sanai Shrine'''|左内神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|WD=Q134917286}}

{{nihongo|'''Sanai Shrine'''|左内神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Sanai Shrine'''|左内神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Sanai Shrine'''|左内神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Sanai Shrine'''|左内神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Sanai Shrine'''|左内神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Sanai Shrine'''|左内神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Sanai Shrine'''|左内神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Sanai Shrine'''|左内神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Sanai Shrine'''|左内神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{Infobox religious building

{{nihongo|'''Sanai Shrine'''|左内神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

revision.comment: 4 revisions imported
revision.text:
{{神社 |名称 = 左内神社 |画像 = [[File:Sanai-jinja (Mishima, Shizuoka).JPG|250px]]
鳥居と拝殿
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|5|39.7|N|138|55|55.8|E}}}} |所在地 = [[静岡県]][[三島市]]中島310-2 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|5|39.7|N|138|55|55.8|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=左内神社|coordinates= {{coord2|35|5|39.7|N|138|55|55.8|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} |祭神 = 阿米都瀬氣多知命 |社格 = [[式内社]]、旧[[村社]] |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 7月17日 |神事 = }} '''左内神社'''（さないじんじゃ）は、[[静岡県]][[三島市]]中島に鎮座する[[神社]][http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402003 左内神社] - 静岡県神社庁。 == 概要 == 三島市の中島地区の南西、[[御殿川]]と中島公民館の狭間に鎮座している。 [[式内社]]である'''文梨神社'''（ふみなしじんじゃ）/'''父無神社'''（ちちなしじんじゃ）、あるいは'''阿米都瀬気多知命神社'''（あめつせけたちのみことじんじゃ）に比定されている[https://www.city.mishima.shizuoka.jp/ipn030092.html 左内神社] - 三島市[https://www.city.mishima.shizuoka.jp/mishima_info/amenity/rekishi/jinja/jinnja.htm 神社] - 三島市。 創建は不詳だが、かつてはその名の通り、[[三嶋大社]]の参道でもある旧下田街道の東側（三嶋大社から見て左側）に鎮座していたとされる。 具体的には、元来は現在地より北方、中地区の手無(てなし)地蔵の付近に鎮座していたとされ、一説には手無(てなし)も、父無(ちちなし)(→文梨(ふみなし))も、'''父梨/父無(ててなし)'''が訛ったものとされる。 そこから南方の現・中島浄水場付近に遷座したが（石碑あり）、[[明治]]19年（[[1886年]]）2月に火災に遭い、建物を全部焼失し、宝物、古文書を全部失ってしまう。その後、明治20年（[[1887年]]）4月に現地に移転新築し、[[昭和]]16年（[[1941年]]）に改築され今日に至っている。 == 祭神 == * 阿米都瀬気多知命（あめつせけたちのみこと） == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} == 関連項目 == * [[右内神社]] * [[三嶋大社]] == 外部リンク == * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402003 左内神社] - 静岡県神社庁 * [https://www.city.mishima.shizuoka.jp/ipn030092.html 左内神社] - 三島市 ** [https://www.city.mishima.shizuoka.jp/mishima_info/amenity/rekishi/jinja/jinnja.htm 神社] - 三島市 {{デフォルトソート:さないしんしや}} [[Category:静岡県の旧村社]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]] [[Category:三島市の建築物]] [[Category:三島市の歴史]]

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[左内神社]] to [[Sanai Shrine]] without leaving a redirect: Merging Japanese Wikipedia import with English content
revision.text:
{{神社 |名称 = 左内神社 |画像 = [[File:Sanai-jinja (Mishima, Shizuoka).JPG|250px]]
鳥居と拝殿
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|5|39.7|N|138|55|55.8|E}}}} |所在地 = [[静岡県]][[三島市]]中島310-2 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|5|39.7|N|138|55|55.8|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=左内神社|coordinates= {{coord2|35|5|39.7|N|138|55|55.8|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} |祭神 = 阿米都瀬氣多知命 |社格 = [[式内社]]、旧[[村社]] |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 7月17日 |神事 = }} '''左内神社'''（さないじんじゃ）は、[[静岡県]][[三島市]]中島に鎮座する[[神社]][http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402003 左内神社] - 静岡県神社庁。 == 概要 == 三島市の中島地区の南西、[[御殿川]]と中島公民館の狭間に鎮座している。 [[式内社]]である'''文梨神社'''（ふみなしじんじゃ）/'''父無神社'''（ちちなしじんじゃ）、あるいは'''阿米都瀬気多知命神社'''（あめつせけたちのみことじんじゃ）に比定されている[https://www.city.mishima.shizuoka.jp/ipn030092.html 左内神社] - 三島市[https://www.city.mishima.shizuoka.jp/mishima_info/amenity/rekishi/jinja/jinnja.htm 神社] - 三島市。 創建は不詳だが、かつてはその名の通り、[[三嶋大社]]の参道でもある旧下田街道の東側（三嶋大社から見て左側）に鎮座していたとされる。 具体的には、元来は現在地より北方、中地区の手無(てなし)地蔵の付近に鎮座していたとされ、一説には手無(てなし)も、父無(ちちなし)(→文梨(ふみなし))も、'''父梨/父無(ててなし)'''が訛ったものとされる。 そこから南方の現・中島浄水場付近に遷座したが（石碑あり）、[[明治]]19年（[[1886年]]）2月に火災に遭い、建物を全部焼失し、宝物、古文書を全部失ってしまう。その後、明治20年（[[1887年]]）4月に現地に移転新築し、[[昭和]]16年（[[1941年]]）に改築され今日に至っている。 == 祭神 == * 阿米都瀬気多知命（あめつせけたちのみこと） == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} == 関連項目 == * [[右内神社]] * [[三嶋大社]] == 外部リンク == * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402003 左内神社] - 静岡県神社庁 * [https://www.city.mishima.shizuoka.jp/ipn030092.html 左内神社] - 三島市 ** [https://www.city.mishima.shizuoka.jp/mishima_info/amenity/rekishi/jinja/jinnja.htm 神社] - 三島市 {{デフォルトソート:さないしんしや}} [[Category:静岡県の旧村社]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]] [[Category:三島市の建築物]] [[Category:三島市の歴史]]

== {{神社 |名称 = 左内神社 |画像 = [[File:Sanai-jinja (Mishima, Shizuoka).JPG|250px]]
鳥居と拝殿
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|5|39.7|N|138|55|55.8|E}}}} |所在地 = [[静岡県]][[三島市]]中島310-2 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|5|39.7|N|138|55|55.8|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=左内神社|coordinates= {{coord2|35|5|39.7|N|138|55|55.8|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} |祭神 = 阿米都瀬氣多知命 |社格 = [[式内社]]、旧[[村社]] |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 7月17日 |神事 = }} '''左内神社'''（さないじんじゃ）は、[[静岡県]][[三島市]]中島に鎮座する[[神社]][http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402003 左内神社] - 静岡県神社庁。 == 概要 == 三島市の中島地区の南西、[[御殿川]]と中島公民館の狭間に鎮座している。 [[式内社]]である'''文梨神社'''（ふみなしじんじゃ）/'''父無神社'''（ちちなしじんじゃ）、あるいは'''阿米都瀬気多知命神社'''（あめつせけたちのみことじんじゃ）に比定されている[https://www.city.mishima.shizuoka.jp/ipn030092.html 左内神社] - 三島市[https://www.city.mishima.shizuoka.jp/mishima_info/amenity/rekishi/jinja/jinnja.htm 神社] - 三島市。 創建は不詳だが、かつてはその名の通り、[[三嶋大社]]の参道でもある旧下田街道の東側（三嶋大社から見て左側）に鎮座していたとされる。 具体的には、元来は現在地より北方、中地区の手無(てなし)地蔵の付近に鎮座していたとされ、一説には手無(てなし)も、父無(ちちなし)(→文梨(ふみなし))も、'''父梨/父無(ててなし)'''が訛ったものとされる。 そこから南方の現・中島浄水場付近に遷座したが（石碑あり）、[[明治]]19年（[[1886年]]）2月に火災に遭い、建物を全部焼失し、宝物、古文書を全部失ってしまう。その後、明治20年（[[1887年]]）4月に現地に移転新築し、[[昭和]]16年（[[1941年]]）に改築され今日に至っている。 == 祭神 == * 阿米都瀬気多知命（あめつせけたちのみこと） == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} == 関連項目 == * [[右内神社]] * [[三嶋大社]] == 外部リンク == * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402003 左内神社] - 静岡県神社庁 * [https://www.city.mishima.shizuoka.jp/ipn030092.html 左内神社] - 三島市 ** [https://www.city.mishima.shizuoka.jp/mishima_info/amenity/rekishi/jinja/jinnja.htm 神社] - 三島市 {{デフォルトソート:さないしんしや}} [[Category:静岡県の旧村社]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]] [[Category:三島市の建築物]] [[Category:三島市の歴史]] ==End Japanese==

[[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] {{translated page|ja|左内神社|version=103460176|comment=Imported full ja history}}[[Category:Automerged Japanese text]] == Japanese Wikipedia content == {{神社 |名称 = 左内神社 |画像 = [[File:Sanai-jinja (Mishima, Shizuoka).JPG|250px]]
鳥居と拝殿
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|5|39.7|N|138|55|55.8|E}}}} |所在地 = [[静岡県]][[三島市]]中島310-2 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|5|39.7|N|138|55|55.8|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=左内神社|coordinates= {{coord2|35|5|39.7|N|138|55|55.8|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} |祭神 = 阿米都瀬氣多知命 |社格 = [[式内社]]、旧[[村社]] |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 7月17日 |神事 = }} '''左内神社'''（さないじんじゃ）は、[[静岡県]][[三島市]]中島に鎮座する[[神社]][http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402003 左内神社] - 静岡県神社庁。 == 概要 == 三島市の中島地区の南西、[[御殿川]]と中島公民館の狭間に鎮座している。 [[式内社]]である'''文梨神社'''（ふみなしじんじゃ）/'''父無神社'''（ちちなしじんじゃ）、あるいは'''阿米都瀬気多知命神社'''（あめつせけたちのみことじんじゃ）に比定されている[https://www.city.mishima.shizuoka.jp/ipn030092.html 左内神社] - 三島市[https://www.city.mishima.shizuoka.jp/mishima_info/amenity/rekishi/jinja/jinnja.htm 神社] - 三島市。 創建は不詳だが、かつてはその名の通り、[[三嶋大社]]の参道でもある旧下田街道の東側（三嶋大社から見て左側）に鎮座していたとされる。 具体的には、元来は現在地より北方、中地区の手無(てなし)地蔵の付近に鎮座していたとされ、一説には手無(てなし)も、父無(ちちなし)(→文梨(ふみなし))も、'''父梨/父無(ててなし)'''が訛ったものとされる。 そこから南方の現・中島浄水場付近に遷座したが（石碑あり）、[[明治]]19年（[[1886年]]）2月に火災に遭い、建物を全部焼失し、宝物、古文書を全部失ってしまう。その後、明治20年（[[1887年]]）4月に現地に移転新築し、[[昭和]]16年（[[1941年]]）に改築され今日に至っている。 == 祭神 == * 阿米都瀬気多知命（あめつせけたちのみこと） == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} == 関連項目 == * [[右内神社]] * [[三嶋大社]] == 外部リンク == * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402003 左内神社] - 静岡県神社庁 * [https://www.city.mishima.shizuoka.jp/ipn030092.html 左内神社] - 三島市 ** [https://www.city.mishima.shizuoka.jp/mishima_info/amenity/rekishi/jinja/jinnja.htm 神社] - 三島市 ==End Japanese== [[Category:静岡県の旧村社]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]] [[Category:三島市の建築物]] [[Category:三島市の歴史]]

[[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[JA:左内神社]] {{wikidata link|Q134926924}} [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] {{translated page|ja|左内神社|version=103460176|comment=Imported full ja history}}[[Category:Automerged Japanese text]] == Japanese Wikipedia content == {{神社 |名称 = 左内神社 |画像 = [[File:Sanai-jinja (Mishima, Shizuoka).JPG|250px]]
鳥居と拝殿
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|5|39.7|N|138|55|55.8|E}}}} |所在地 = {{jalink|静岡県|Q131320}}{{jalink|三島市|Q653478}}中島310-2 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|5|39.7|N|138|55|55.8|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=左内神社|coordinates= {{coord2|35|5|39.7|N|138|55|55.8|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} |祭神 = 阿米都瀬氣多知命 |社格 = {{jalink|式内社}}、旧{{jalink|村社}} |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 7月17日 |神事 = }} '''左内神社'''（さないじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|静岡県|Q131320}}{{jalink|三島市|Q653478}}中島に鎮座する{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402003 左内神社] - 静岡県神社庁。 == 概要 == 三島市の中島地区の南西、{{jalink|御殿川|Q18988494}}と中島公民館の狭間に鎮座している。 {{jalink|式内社}}である'''文梨神社'''（ふみなしじんじゃ）/'''父無神社'''（ちちなしじんじゃ）、あるいは'''阿米都瀬気多知命神社'''（あめつせけたちのみことじんじゃ）に比定されている[https://www.city.mishima.shizuoka.jp/ipn030092.html 左内神社] - 三島市[https://www.city.mishima.shizuoka.jp/mishima_info/amenity/rekishi/jinja/jinnja.htm 神社] - 三島市。 創建は不詳だが、かつてはその名の通り、{{jalink|三嶋大社|Q650772}}の参道でもある旧下田街道の東側（三嶋大社から見て左側）に鎮座していたとされる。 具体的には、元来は現在地より北方、中地区の手無(てなし)地蔵の付近に鎮座していたとされ、一説には手無(てなし)も、父無(ちちなし)(→文梨(ふみなし))も、'''父梨/父無(ててなし)'''が訛ったものとされる。 そこから南方の現・中島浄水場付近に遷座したが（石碑あり）、{{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}19年（{{jalink|1886年|Q7822}}）2月に火災に遭い、建物を全部焼失し、宝物、古文書を全部失ってしまう。その後、明治20年（{{jalink|1887年|Q7826}}）4月に現地に移転新築し、{{jalink|昭和|Q327567}}16年（{{jalink|1941年|Q5231}}）に改築され今日に至っている。 == 祭神 == * 阿米都瀬気多知命（あめつせけたちのみこと） == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} == 関連項目 == * {{jalink|右内神社|Q134927903}} * {{jalink|三嶋大社|Q650772}} == 外部リンク == * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402003 左内神社] - 静岡県神社庁 * [https://www.city.mishima.shizuoka.jp/ipn030092.html 左内神社] - 三島市 ** [https://www.city.mishima.shizuoka.jp/mishima_info/amenity/rekishi/jinja/jinnja.htm 神社] - 三島市 ==End Japanese== [[Category:静岡県の旧村社]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]] [[Category:三島市の建築物]] [[Category:三島市の歴史]]

[[File:Sanai-jinja (Mishima, Shizuoka).JPG|250px]]
鳥居と拝殿
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|5|39.7|N|138|55|55.8|E}}}} |所在地 = {{jalink|静岡県|Q131320}}{{jalink|三島市|Q653478}}中島310-2 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|5|39.7|N|138|55|55.8|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=左内神社|coordinates= {{coord2|35|5|39.7|N|138|55|55.8|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} |祭神 = 阿米都瀬氣多知命 |社格 = {{jalink|式内社}}、旧{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}} |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 7月17日 |神事 = }} '''左内神社'''（さないじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|静岡県|Q131320}}{{jalink|三島市|Q653478}}中島に鎮座する{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402003 左内神社] - 静岡県神社庁。 === 概要 === 三島市の中島地区の南西、{{jalink|御殿川|Q18988494}}と中島公民館の狭間に鎮座している。 {{jalink|式内社}}である'''文梨神社'''（ふみなしじんじゃ）/'''父無神社'''（ちちなしじんじゃ）、あるいは'''阿米都瀬気多知命神社'''（あめつせけたちのみことじんじゃ）に比定されている[https://www.city.mishima.shizuoka.jp/ipn030092.html 左内神社] - 三島市[https://www.city.mishima.shizuoka.jp/mishima_info/amenity/rekishi/jinja/jinnja.htm 神社] - 三島市。 創建は不詳だが、かつてはその名の通り、{{jalink|三嶋大社|Q650772}}の参道でもある旧下田街道の東側（三嶋大社から見て左側）に鎮座していたとされる。 具体的には、元来は現在地より北方、中地区の手無(てなし)地蔵の付近に鎮座していたとされ、一説には手無(てなし)も、父無(ちちなし)(→文梨(ふみなし))も、'''父梨/父無(ててなし)'''が訛ったものとされる。 そこから南方の現・中島浄水場付近に遷座したが（石碑あり）、{{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}19年（{{jalink|1886年|Q7822}}）2月に火災に遭い、建物を全部焼失し、宝物、古文書を全部失ってしまう。その後、明治20年（{{jalink|1887年|Q7826}}）4月に現地に移転新築し、{{jalink|昭和|Q327567}}16年（{{jalink|1941年|Q5231}}）に改築され今日に至っている。 === 祭神 === * 阿米都瀬気多知命（あめつせけたちのみこと） === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} === 関連項目 === * {{jalink|右内神社|Q134927903}} * {{jalink|三嶋大社|Q650772}} === 外部リンク === * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402003 左内神社] - 静岡県神社庁 * [https://www.city.mishima.shizuoka.jp/ipn030092.html 左内神社] - 三島市 ** [https://www.city.mishima.shizuoka.jp/mishima_info/amenity/rekishi/jinja/jinnja.htm 神社] - 三島市 {{デフォルトソート:さないしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Autogenerated pages with jawiki interwikis, possibly accidentally overwritten]] [[Category:Shikinaisha]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:静岡県の旧村社]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]] [[Category:三島市の建築物]] [[Category:三島市の歴史]]

|Image = [[File:Sanai-jinja (Mishima, Shizuoka).JPG|250px]]
Torii gate and worship hall
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|5|39.7|N|138|55|55.8|E}}}} |Location = {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320}}{{jalink|Mishima City|Q653478}} Nakajima 310-2 |Coordinates = {{Wiki coordinates DMS|35|5|39.7|N|138|55|55.8|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |Map = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=Sanai Shrine|coordinates= {{coord2|35|5|39.7|N|138|55|55.8|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} |Enshrined deity = Ametsuseketachi-no-Mikoto |Shrine rank = {{jalink|Shikinaisha}}; former {{jalink|Village shrine|Q134917284}} |Founded = |Main hall = |Other names = |Pilgrimage affiliation = |Annual festival = July 17 |Rituals = }} '''Sanai Shrine''' (さないじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} located in Nakajima, {{jalink|Mishima City|Q653478}}, {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320}}.[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402003 Sanai Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines === Overview === It is situated in the southwestern part of Mishima City’s Nakajima district, between the {{jalink|Gotengawa River|Q18988494}} and the Nakajima Community Center. It is identified with the {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} '''Fuminashi Shrine''' (ふみなしじんじゃ) / '''Chichinashi Shrine''' (ちちなしじんじゃ), or '''Ametsuseketachi-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (あめつせけたちのみことじんじゃ).[https://www.city.mishima.shizuoka.jp/ipn030092.html Sanai Shrine] - Mishima City[https://www.city.mishima.shizuoka.jp/mishima_info/amenity/rekishi/jinja/jinnja.htm Shrines] - Mishima City The date of its founding is unknown, but it is said that, as its name suggests, it once stood on the east side (the left side when viewed from Mishima Taisha) of the old Shimoda Highway, which also served as the approach to {{jalink|Mishima Taisha|Q650772}}. More specifically, it is said to have originally stood to the north of its present location, near the Tenashi (てなし) Jizō in the Naka district. According to one theory, both Tenashi (てなし) and Chichinashi (ちちなし) (→ Fuminashi (ふみなし)) are corruptions of '''tetenashi''' (父梨/父無). From there it was relocated south to the area around the present Nakajima Water Purification Plant (there is a stone monument to this effect), but in February of Meiji 19 (1886) it was damaged by a fire that destroyed all of its buildings, resulting in the loss of all treasures and ancient documents. It was subsequently relocated and rebuilt at its current site in April of Meiji 20 (1887), and was renovated in Shōwa 16 (1941), remaining as it is today. === Enshrined deity === * Ametsuseketachi-no-Mikoto (阿米都瀬気多知命) === Notes === {{Reflist}} === See also === * {{jalink|Uchinai Shrine|Q134927903}} * {{jalink|Mishima Taisha|Q650772}} === External links === * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402003 Sanai Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines * [https://www.city.mishima.shizuoka.jp/ipn030092.html Sanai Shrine] - Mishima City ** [https://www.city.mishima.shizuoka.jp/mishima_info/amenity/rekishi/jinja/jinnja.htm Shrines] - Mishima City {{DEFAULTSORT:Sanai Shrine}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Autogenerated pages with jawiki interwikis, possibly accidentally overwritten]] [[Category:Shikinaisha]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:静岡県の旧村社]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]] [[Category:三島市の建築物]] [[Category:三島市の歴史]]

{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|5|39.7|N|138|55|55.8|E}}}} |Location = {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320}}{{jalink|Mishima City|Q653478}} Nakajima 310-2 |Coordinates = {{Wiki coordinates DMS|35|5|39.7|N|138|55|55.8|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |Map = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=Sanai Shrine|coordinates= {{coord2|35|5|39.7|N|138|55|55.8|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} |Enshrined deity = Ametsuseketachi-no-Mikoto |Shrine rank = {{jalink|Shikinaisha}}; former {{jalink|Village shrine|Q134917284}} |Founded = |Main hall = |Other names = |Pilgrimage affiliation = |Annual festival = July 17 |Rituals = }} '''Sanai Shrine''' (さないじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} located in Nakajima, {{jalink|Mishima City|Q653478}}, {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320}}.[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402003 Sanai Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines === Overview === It is situated in the southwestern part of Mishima City’s Nakajima district, between the {{jalink|Gotengawa River|Q18988494}} and the Nakajima Community Center. It is identified with the {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} '''Fuminashi Shrine''' (ふみなしじんじゃ) / '''Chichinashi Shrine''' (ちちなしじんじゃ), or '''Ametsuseketachi-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (あめつせけたちのみことじんじゃ).[https://www.city.mishima.shizuoka.jp/ipn030092.html Sanai Shrine] - Mishima City[https://www.city.mishima.shizuoka.jp/mishima_info/amenity/rekishi/jinja/jinnja.htm Shrines] - Mishima City The date of its founding is unknown, but it is said that, as its name suggests, it once stood on the east side (the left side when viewed from Mishima Taisha) of the old Shimoda Highway, which also served as the approach to {{jalink|Mishima Taisha|Q650772}}. More specifically, it is said to have originally stood to the north of its present location, near the Tenashi (てなし) Jizō in the Naka district. According to one theory, both Tenashi (てなし) and Chichinashi (ちちなし) (→ Fuminashi (ふみなし)) are corruptions of '''tetenashi''' (父梨/父無). From there it was relocated south to the area around the present Nakajima Water Purification Plant (there is a stone monument to this effect), but in February of Meiji 19 (1886) it was damaged by a fire that destroyed all of its buildings, resulting in the loss of all treasures and ancient documents. It was subsequently relocated and rebuilt at its current site in April of Meiji 20 (1887), and was renovated in Shōwa 16 (1941), remaining as it is today. === Enshrined deity === * Ametsuseketachi-no-Mikoto (阿米都瀬気多知命) === Notes === {{Reflist}} === See also === * {{jalink|Uchinai Shrine|Q134927903}} * {{jalink|Mishima Taisha|Q650772}} === External links === * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402003 Sanai Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines * [https://www.city.mishima.shizuoka.jp/ipn030092.html Sanai Shrine] - Mishima City ** [https://www.city.mishima.shizuoka.jp/mishima_info/amenity/rekishi/jinja/jinnja.htm Shrines] - Mishima City {{DEFAULTSORT:Sanai Shrine}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Autogenerated pages with jawiki interwikis, possibly accidentally overwritten]] [[Category:Shikinaisha]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:静岡県の旧村社]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]] [[Category:三島市の建築物]] [[Category:三島市の歴史]]

Shrine|lt=Ametsuseno- Shrine|WD=Q135039676}} * {{ill|Fumunashino Shrine|lt=Fumunashino Shrine|WD=Q135039668}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database ** P2868: {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|WD=Q135022904}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '静岡県三島市中島', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:左内神社]] {{wikidata link|Q134926924}} == Japanese content == {{Shinto shrine |Name = Sanai Shrine |Image = [[File:Sanai-jinja (Mishima, Shizuoka).JPG|250px]]
Torii gate and worship hall
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|5|39.7|N|138|55|55.8|E}}}} |Location = {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320}}{{jalink|Mishima City|Q653478}} Nakajima 310-2 |Coordinates = {{Wiki coordinates DMS|35|5|39.7|N|138|55|55.8|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |Map = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=Sanai Shrine|coordinates= {{coord2|35|5|39.7|N|138|55|55.8|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} |Enshrined deity = Ametsuseketachi-no-Mikoto |Shrine rank = {{jalink|Shikinaisha}}; former {{jalink|Village shrine|Q134917284}} |Founded = |Main hall = |Other names = |Pilgrimage affiliation = |Annual festival = July 17 |Rituals = }} '''Sanai Shrine''' (さないじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} located in Nakajima, {{jalink|Mishima City|Q653478}}, {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320}}.[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402003 Sanai Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines === Overview === It is situated in the southwestern part of Mishima City’s Nakajima district, between the {{jalink|Gotengawa River|Q18988494}} and the Nakajima Community Center. It is identified with the {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} '''Fuminashi Shrine''' (ふみなしじんじゃ) / '''Chichinashi Shrine''' (ちちなしじんじゃ), or '''Ametsuseketachi-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (あめつせけたちのみことじんじゃ).[https://www.city.mishima.shizuoka.jp/ipn030092.html Sanai Shrine] - Mishima City[https://www.city.mishima.shizuoka.jp/mishima_info/amenity/rekishi/jinja/jinnja.htm Shrines] - Mishima City The date of its founding is unknown, but it is said that, as its name suggests, it once stood on the east side (the left side when viewed from Mishima Taisha) of the old Shimoda Highway, which also served as the approach to {{jalink|Mishima Taisha|Q650772}}. More specifically, it is said to have originally stood to the north of its present location, near the Tenashi (てなし) Jizō in the Naka district. According to one theory, both Tenashi (てなし) and Chichinashi (ちちなし) (→ Fuminashi (ふみなし)) are corruptions of '''tetenashi''' (父梨/父無). From there it was relocated south to the area around the present Nakajima Water Purification Plant (there is a stone monument to this effect), but in February of Meiji 19 (1886) it was damaged by a fire that destroyed all of its buildings, resulting in the loss of all treasures and ancient documents. It was subsequently relocated and rebuilt at its current site in April of Meiji 20 (1887), and was renovated in Shōwa 16 (1941), remaining as it is today. === Enshrined deity === * Ametsuseketachi-no-Mikoto (阿米都瀬気多知命) === Notes === {{Reflist}} === See also === * {{jalink|Uchinai Shrine|Q134927903}} * {{jalink|Mishima Taisha|Q650772}} === External links === * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402003 Sanai Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines * [https://www.city.mishima.shizuoka.jp/ipn030092.html Sanai Shrine] - Mishima City ** [https://www.city.mishima.shizuoka.jp/mishima_info/amenity/rekishi/jinja/jinnja.htm Shrines] - Mishima City {{DEFAULTSORT:Sanai Shrine}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Sanai Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Sanai Shrine]][[Category:Pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Sanai Shrine]][[Category:Pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:静岡県の旧村社]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]] [[Category:三島市の建築物]] [[Category:三島市の歴史]]

|Image = [[File:Sanai-jinja (Mishima, Shizuoka).JPG|250px]]
Torii gate and worship hall
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|5|39.7|N|138|55|55.8|E}}}} |Location = {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320}}{{ill|lt=Mishima City|Q653478|WD=Q653478}} Nakajima 310-2 |Coordinates = {{Wiki coordinates DMS|35|5|39.7|N|138|55|55.8|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |Map = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=Sanai Shrine|coordinates= {{coord2|35|5|39.7|N|138|55|55.8|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} |Enshrined deity = Ametsuseketachi-no-Mikoto |Shrine rank = {{ill||lt=Shikinaisha|UNKNOWN}}; former {{ill|lt=Village shrine|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}} |Founded = |Main hall = |Other names = |Pilgrimage affiliation = |Annual festival = July 17 |Rituals = }} '''Sanai Shrine''' (さないじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} located in Nakajima, {{ill|lt=Mishima City|Q653478|WD=Q653478}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320}}.[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402003 Sanai Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines === Overview === It is situated in the southwestern part of Mishima City’s Nakajima district, between the {{ill|lt=Gotengawa River|Q18988494|WD=Q18988494}} and the Nakajima Community Center. It is identified with the {{ill||lt=Shikinaisha|UNKNOWN}} '''Fuminashi Shrine''' (ふみなしじんじゃ) / '''Chichinashi Shrine''' (ちちなしじんじゃ), or '''Ametsuseketachi-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (あめつせけたちのみことじんじゃ).[https://www.city.mishima.shizuoka.jp/ipn030092.html Sanai Shrine] - Mishima City[https://www.city.mishima.shizuoka.jp/mishima_info/amenity/rekishi/jinja/jinnja.htm Shrines] - Mishima City The date of its founding is unknown, but it is said that, as its name suggests, it once stood on the east side (the left side when viewed from Mishima Taisha) of the old Shimoda Highway, which also served as the approach to {{ill|lt=Mishima Taisha|Q650772|WD=Q650772}}. More specifically, it is said to have originally stood to the north of its present location, near the Tenashi (てなし) Jizō in the Naka district. According to one theory, both Tenashi (てなし) and Chichinashi (ちちなし) (→ Fuminashi (ふみなし)) are corruptions of '''tetenashi''' (父梨/父無). From there it was relocated south to the area around the present Nakajima Water Purification Plant (there is a stone monument to this effect), but in February of Meiji 19 (1886) it was damaged by a fire that destroyed all of its buildings, resulting in the loss of all treasures and ancient documents. It was subsequently relocated and rebuilt at its current site in April of Meiji 20 (1887), and was renovated in Shōwa 16 (1941), remaining as it is today. === Enshrined deity === * Ametsuseketachi-no-Mikoto (阿米都瀬気多知命) === Notes === {{Reflist}} === See also === * {{ill|lt=Uchinai Shrine|Q134927903|WD=Q134927903}} * {{ill|lt=Mishima Taisha|Q650772|WD=Q650772}} === External links === * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402003 Sanai Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines * [https://www.city.mishima.shizuoka.jp/ipn030092.html Sanai Shrine] - Mishima City ** [https://www.city.mishima.shizuoka.jp/mishima_info/amenity/rekishi/jinja/jinnja.htm Shrines] - Mishima City {{DEFAULTSORT:Sanai Shrine}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Sanai Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Sanai Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Sanai Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:静岡県の旧村社]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]] [[Category:三島市の建築物]] [[Category:三島市の歴史]]

According to one theory, both Tenashi (てなし) and Chichinashi (ちちなし) (→ Fuminashi (ふみなし)) are corruptions of '''tetenashi''' (父梨/父無). From there it was relocated south to the area around the present Nakajima Water Purification Plant (there is a stone monument to this effect), but in February of Meiji 19 (1886) it was damaged by a fire that destroyed all of its buildings, resulting in the loss of all treasures and ancient documents. It was subsequently relocated and rebuilt at its current site in April of Meiji 20 (1887), and was renovated in Shōwa 16 (1941), remaining as it is today. === Enshrined deity === * Ametsuseketachi-no-Mikoto (阿米都瀬気多知命) === Notes === {{Reflist}} === See also === * {{ill|lt=Uchinai Shrine|Q134927903|WD=Q134927903}} * {{ill|lt=Mishima Taisha|Q650772|WD=Q650772}} === External links === * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402003 Sanai Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines * [https://www.city.mishima.shizuoka.jp/ipn030092.html Sanai Shrine] - Mishima City ** [https://www.city.mishima.shizuoka.jp/mishima_info/amenity/rekishi/jinja/jinnja.htm Shrines] - Mishima City {{DEFAULTSORT:Sanai Shrine}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Sanai Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Sanai Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Sanai Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:静岡県の旧村社]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]] [[Category:三島市の建築物]] [[Category:三島市の歴史]]

It is identified with the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917286}} '''Fuminashi Shrine''' (ふみなしじんじゃ) / '''Chichinashi Shrine''' (ちちなしじんじゃ), or '''Ametsuseketachi-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (あめつせけたちのみことじんじゃ).[https://www.city.mishima.shizuoka.jp/ipn030092.html Sanai Shrine] - Mishima City[https://www.city.mishima.shizuoka.jp/mishima_info/amenity/rekishi/jinja/jinnja.htm Shrines] - Mishima City The date of its founding is unknown, but it is said that, as its name suggests, it once stood on the east side (the left side when viewed from Mishima Taisha) of the old Shimoda Highway, which also served as the approach to {{ill|lt=Mishima Taisha|Q650772|WD=Q650772}}. More specifically, it is said to have originally stood to the north of its present location, near the Tenashi (てなし) Jizō in the Naka district. According to one theory, both Tenashi (てなし) and Chichinashi (ちちなし) (→ Fuminashi (ふみなし)) are corruptions of '''tetenashi''' (父梨/父無). From there it was relocated south to the area around the present Nakajima Water Purification Plant (there is a stone monument to this effect), but in February of Meiji 19 (1886) it was damaged by a fire that destroyed all of its buildings, resulting in the loss of all treasures and ancient documents. It was subsequently relocated and rebuilt at its current site in April of Meiji 20 (1887), and was renovated in Shōwa 16 (1941), remaining as it is today. === Enshrined deity === * Ametsuseketachi-no-Mikoto (阿米都瀬気多知命) === Notes === {{Reflist}} === See also === * {{ill|lt=Uchinai Shrine|Q134927903|WD=Q134927903}} * {{ill|lt=Mishima Taisha|Q650772|WD=Q650772}} === External links === * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402003 Sanai Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines * [https://www.city.mishima.shizuoka.jp/ipn030092.html Sanai Shrine] - Mishima City ** [https://www.city.mishima.shizuoka.jp/mishima_info/amenity/rekishi/jinja/jinnja.htm Shrines] - Mishima City {{DEFAULTSORT:Sanai Shrine}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Sanai Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Sanai Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Sanai Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:静岡県の旧村社]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]] [[Category:三島市の建築物]] [[Category:三島市の歴史]]

{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|5|39.7|N|138|55|55.8|E}}}} |Location = {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Mishima City|Q653478|WD=Q653478|1=Mishima, Shizuoka}} Nakajima 310-2 |Coordinates = {{Wiki coordinates DMS|35|5|39.7|N|138|55|55.8|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |Map = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=Sanai Shrine|coordinates= {{coord2|35|5|39.7|N|138|55|55.8|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} |Enshrined deity = Ametsuseketachi-no-Mikoto |Shrine rank = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}}; former {{ill|lt=Village shrine|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} |Founded = |Main hall = |Other names = |Pilgrimage affiliation = |Annual festival = July 17 |Rituals = }} '''Sanai Shrine''' (さないじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} located in Nakajima, {{ill|lt=Mishima City|Q653478|WD=Q653478|1=Mishima, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}.[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402003 Sanai Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines === Overview === It is situated in the southwestern part of Mishima City’s Nakajima district, between the {{ill|lt=Gotengawa River|Q18988494|WD=Q18988494|1=Gotengawa River}} and the Nakajima Community Center. It is identified with the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} '''Fuminashi Shrine''' (ふみなしじんじゃ) / '''Chichinashi Shrine''' (ちちなしじんじゃ), or '''Ametsuseketachi-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (あめつせけたちのみことじんじゃ).[https://www.city.mishima.shizuoka.jp/ipn030092.html Sanai Shrine] - Mishima City[https://www.city.mishima.shizuoka.jp/mishima_info/amenity/rekishi/jinja/jinnja.htm Shrines] - Mishima City The date of its founding is unknown, but it is said that, as its name suggests, it once stood on the east side (the left side when viewed from Mishima Taisha) of the old Shimoda Highway, which also served as the approach to {{ill|lt=Mishima Taisha|Q650772|WD=Q650772|1=Mishima Taisha}}. More specifically, it is said to have originally stood to the north of its present location, near the Tenashi (てなし) Jizō in the Naka district. According to one theory, both Tenashi (てなし) and Chichinashi (ちちなし) (→ Fuminashi (ふみなし)) are corruptions of '''tetenashi''' (父梨/父無). From there it was relocated south to the area around the present Nakajima Water Purification Plant (there is a stone monument to this effect), but in February of Meiji 19 (1886) it was damaged by a fire that destroyed all of its buildings, resulting in the loss of all treasures and ancient documents. It was subsequently relocated and rebuilt at its current site in April of Meiji 20 (1887), and was renovated in Shōwa 16 (1941), remaining as it is today. === Enshrined deity === * Ametsuseketachi-no-Mikoto (阿米都瀬気多知命) === Notes === {{Reflist}} === See also === * {{ill|lt=Uchinai Shrine|Q134927903|WD=Q134927903|1=Unai Shrine}} * {{ill|lt=Mishima Taisha|Q650772|WD=Q650772|1=Mishima Taisha}} === External links === * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402003 Sanai Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines * [https://www.city.mishima.shizuoka.jp/ipn030092.html Sanai Shrine] - Mishima City ** [https://www.city.mishima.shizuoka.jp/mishima_info/amenity/rekishi/jinja/jinnja.htm Shrines] - Mishima City {{DEFAULTSORT:Sanai Shrine}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Sanai Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Sanai Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Sanai Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:静岡県の旧村社]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]] [[Category:三島市の建築物]] [[Category:三島市の歴史]]

{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|5|39.7|N|138|55|55.8|E}}}} |Location = {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Mishima City|Q653478|WD=Q653478|1=Mishima, Shizuoka}} Nakajima 310-2 |Coordinates = {{Wiki coordinates DMS|35|5|39.7|N|138|55|55.8|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |Map = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=Sanai Shrine|coordinates= {{coord2|35|5|39.7|N|138|55|55.8|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} |Enshrined deity = Ametsuseketachi-no-Mikoto |Shrine rank = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}}; former {{ill|lt=Village shrine|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} |Founded = |Main hall = |Other names = |Pilgrimage affiliation = |Annual festival = July 17 |Rituals = }} '''Sanai Shrine''' (さないじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} located in Nakajima, {{ill|lt=Mishima City|Q653478|WD=Q653478|1=Mishima, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}.[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402003 Sanai Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines === Overview === It is situated in the southwestern part of Mishima City’s Nakajima district, between the {{ill|lt=Gotengawa River|Q18988494|WD=Q18988494|1=Gotengawa River}} and the Nakajima Community Center. It is identified with the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} '''Fuminashi Shrine''' (ふみなしじんじゃ) / '''Chichinashi Shrine''' (ちちなしじんじゃ), or '''Ametsuseketachi-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (あめつせけたちのみことじんじゃ).[https://www.city.mishima.shizuoka.jp/ipn030092.html Sanai Shrine] - Mishima City[https://www.city.mishima.shizuoka.jp/mishima_info/amenity/rekishi/jinja/jinnja.htm Shrines] - Mishima City The date of its founding is unknown, but it is said that, as its name suggests, it once stood on the east side (the left side when viewed from Mishima Taisha) of the old Shimoda Highway, which also served as the approach to {{ill|lt=Mishima Taisha|Q650772|WD=Q650772|1=Mishima Taisha}}. More specifically, it is said to have originally stood to the north of its present location, near the Tenashi (てなし) Jizō in the Naka district. According to one theory, both Tenashi (てなし) and Chichinashi (ちちなし) (→ Fuminashi (ふみなし)) are corruptions of '''tetenashi''' (父梨/父無). From there it was relocated south to the area around the present Nakajima Water Purification Plant (there is a stone monument to this effect), but in February of Meiji 19 (1886) it was damaged by a fire that destroyed all of its buildings, resulting in the loss of all treasures and ancient documents. It was subsequently relocated and rebuilt at its current site in April of Meiji 20 (1887), and was renovated in Shōwa 16 (1941), remaining as it is today. === Enshrined deity === * Ametsuseketachi-no-Mikoto (阿米都瀬気多知命) === Notes === {{Reflist}} === See also === * {{ill|lt=Uchinai Shrine|Q134927903|WD=Q134927903|1=Unai Shrine}} * {{ill|lt=Mishima Taisha|Q650772|WD=Q650772|1=Mishima Taisha}} === External links === * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402003 Sanai Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines * [https://www.city.mishima.shizuoka.jp/ipn030092.html Sanai Shrine] - Mishima City ** [https://www.city.mishima.shizuoka.jp/mishima_info/amenity/rekishi/jinja/jinnja.htm Shrines] - Mishima City == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Sanai Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Sanai Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Sanai Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:静岡県の旧村社]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]] [[Category:三島市の建築物]] [[Category:三島市の歴史]]

{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|5|39.7|N|138|55|55.8|E}}}} |Location = {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Mishima City|Q653478|WD=Q653478|1=Mishima, Shizuoka}} Nakajima 310-2 |Coordinates = {{Wiki coordinates DMS|35|5|39.7|N|138|55|55.8|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |Map = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=Sanai Shrine|coordinates= {{coord2|35|5|39.7|N|138|55|55.8|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} |Enshrined deity = Ametsuseketachi-no-Mikoto |Shrine rank = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}}; former {{ill|lt=Village shrine|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} |Founded = |Main hall = |Other names = |Pilgrimage affiliation = |Annual festival = July 17 |Rituals = }} '''Sanai Shrine''' (さないじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} located in Nakajima, {{ill|lt=Mishima City|Q653478|WD=Q653478|1=Mishima, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}.[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402003 Sanai Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines === Overview === It is situated in the southwestern part of Mishima City’s Nakajima district, between the {{ill|lt=Gotengawa River|Q18988494|WD=Q18988494|1=Gotengawa River}} and the Nakajima Community Center. It is identified with the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} '''Fuminashi Shrine''' (ふみなしじんじゃ) / '''Chichinashi Shrine''' (ちちなしじんじゃ), or '''Ametsuseketachi-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (あめつせけたちのみことじんじゃ).[https://www.city.mishima.shizuoka.jp/ipn030092.html Sanai Shrine] - Mishima City[https://www.city.mishima.shizuoka.jp/mishima_info/amenity/rekishi/jinja/jinnja.htm Shrines] - Mishima City The date of its founding is unknown, but it is said that, as its name suggests, it once stood on the east side (the left side when viewed from Mishima Taisha) of the old Shimoda Highway, which also served as the approach to {{ill|lt=Mishima Taisha|Q650772|WD=Q650772|1=Mishima Taisha}}. More specifically, it is said to have originally stood to the north of its present location, near the Tenashi (てなし) Jizō in the Naka district. According to one theory, both Tenashi (てなし) and Chichinashi (ちちなし) (→ Fuminashi (ふみなし)) are corruptions of '''tetenashi''' (父梨/父無). From there it was relocated south to the area around the present Nakajima Water Purification Plant (there is a stone monument to this effect), but in February of Meiji 19 (1886) it was damaged by a fire that destroyed all of its buildings, resulting in the loss of all treasures and ancient documents. It was subsequently relocated and rebuilt at its current site in April of Meiji 20 (1887), and was renovated in Shōwa 16 (1941), remaining as it is today. === Enshrined deity === * Ametsuseketachi-no-Mikoto (阿米都瀬気多知命) === Notes === {{Reflist}} === See also === * {{ill|lt=Uchinai Shrine|Q134927903|WD=Q134927903|1=Unai Shrine}} * {{ill|lt=Mishima Taisha|Q650772|WD=Q650772|1=Mishima Taisha}} === External links === * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402003 Sanai Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines * [https://www.city.mishima.shizuoka.jp/ipn030092.html Sanai Shrine] - Mishima City ** [https://www.city.mishima.shizuoka.jp/mishima_info/amenity/rekishi/jinja/jinnja.htm Shrines] - Mishima City == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Sanai Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Sanai Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Sanai Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:静岡県の旧村社]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:Buildings in Mishima, Shizuoka]] [[Category:三島市の歴史]]

(Mishima, Shizuoka).JPG|250px]]
Torii gate and worship hall
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|5|39.7|N|138|55|55.8|E}}}} |Location = {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Mishima City|Q653478|WD=Q653478|1=Mishima, Shizuoka}} Nakajima 310-2 |Coordinates = {{Wiki coordinates DMS|35|5|39.7|N|138|55|55.8|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |Map = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=Sanai Shrine|coordinates= {{coord2|35|5|39.7|N|138|55|55.8|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} |Enshrined deity = Ametsuseketachi-no-Mikoto |Shrine rank = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}}; former {{ill|lt=Village shrine|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} |Founded = |Main hall = |Other names = |Pilgrimage affiliation = |Annual festival = July 17 |Rituals = }} '''Sanai Shrine''' (さないじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} located in Nakajima, {{ill|lt=Mishima City|Q653478|WD=Q653478|1=Mishima, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}.[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402003 Sanai Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines === Overview === It is situated in the southwestern part of Mishima City’s Nakajima district, between the {{ill|lt=Gotengawa River|Q18988494|WD=Q18988494|1=Gotengawa River}} and the Nakajima Community Center. It is identified with the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} '''Fuminashi Shrine''' (ふみなしじんじゃ) / '''Chichinashi Shrine''' (ちちなしじんじゃ), or '''Ametsuseketachi-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (あめつせけたちのみことじんじゃ).[https://www.city.mishima.shizuoka.jp/ipn030092.html Sanai Shrine] - Mishima City[https://www.city.mishima.shizuoka.jp/mishima_info/amenity/rekishi/jinja/jinnja.htm Shrines] - Mishima City The date of its founding is unknown, but it is said that, as its name suggests, it once stood on the east side (the left side when viewed from Mishima Taisha) of the old Shimoda Highway, which also served as the approach to {{ill|lt=Mishima Taisha|Q650772|WD=Q650772|1=Mishima Taisha}}. More specifically, it is said to have originally stood to the north of its present location, near the Tenashi (てなし) Jizō in the Naka district. According to one theory, both Tenashi (てなし) and Chichinashi (ちちなし) (→ Fuminashi (ふみなし)) are corruptions of '''tetenashi''' (父梨/父無). From there it was relocated south to the area around the present Nakajima Water Purification Plant (there is a stone monument to this effect), but in February of Meiji 19 (1886) it was damaged by a fire that destroyed all of its buildings, resulting in the loss of all treasures and ancient documents. It was subsequently relocated and rebuilt at its current site in April of Meiji 20 (1887), and was renovated in Shōwa 16 (1941), remaining as it is today. === Enshrined deity === * Ametsuseketachi-no-Mikoto (阿米都瀬気多知命) === Notes === {{Reflist}} === See also === * {{ill|lt=Uchinai Shrine|Q134927903|WD=Q134927903|1=Unai Shrine}} * {{ill|lt=Mishima Taisha|Q650772|WD=Q650772|1=Mishima Taisha}} === External links === * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402003 Sanai Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines * [https://www.city.mishima.shizuoka.jp/ipn030092.html Sanai Shrine] - Mishima City ** [https://www.city.mishima.shizuoka.jp/mishima_info/amenity/rekishi/jinja/jinnja.htm Shrines] - Mishima City == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Sanai Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Sanai Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Sanai Shrine]][[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:静岡県の旧村社]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Mishima, Shizuoka]] [[Category:三島市の歴史]]
